title: Hover Combat Carrier
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:HoverCombatCarrier-SSW.png|thumb|250x250px|A Hover Combat Carrier]]
The '''Hover Combat Carrier''' was bulky two-person vehicle used by some [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to keep people in line. It was well armed with weapons in the front, back and belly—all controlled by the gunner who sits in the front, while the pilot sits in the center of the vehicle. In addition to the guns, two jet ports could squirt deadly flames at nearby enemies.<ref name="Secrets">''[[Super Star Wars Official Game Secrets]]''</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] was among the locations the carrier has operated.<ref name="SSW">''[[Super Star Wars]]''</ref>
